promotion_rule.primary_gain_gate: all primary recoverable_gain_upper_bound rows >= 0.03 and bootstrap CI low over primary rows > 0
promotion_rule.control_gate: same-family and cross-family rows must stay below the 0.03 promotion gate

rows.boundary_indices: all Granite attention<->SSM boundaries from metadata/architecture_map.json
rows.interpretation: Only these rows can trigger the HybridKernel positive gate.

rows.control_window_ids: stable non-boundary window IDs from Nsight Systems, e.g. granite-layer12-ssm-internal-window
rows.interpretation: Controls for generic launch, CUDA graph, SSM-internal, and attention-internal overhead on the same serving path.

rows.fallback_model_if_unavailable: record unavailable; do not substitute an un-mapped model and do not promote
rows.boundary_indices: all Qwen3-Next config-derived boundaries from metadata/architecture_map.json
rows.interpretation: Falsifies a Granite-specific claim if the same apparent boundary signal appears in a different hybrid family.

missing_control_policy: If either control family cannot be run with the same request/runtime shape, the packet is audit-only and cannot promote HybridKernel.
